// // This is a 4-bit AND gate circuit that performs a bitwise AND operation on two 4-bit input vectors.
module top_module (
	input [3:0] in0,
	input [3:0] in1,
	output reg [3:0] or_out);always_comb begin
		or_out = in0 | in1;
	end
	
endmodule
